content: Death is something that we're often discouraged to talk about or even think about, but I've realized that preparing for death is one of the most empowering things you can do. Thinking about death clarifies your life.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by davearms (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:La morte è qualcosa di cui siamo spesso scoraggiati a parlare o anche pensare, ma ho capito che la preparazione alla mor
